description: Player mentality configurations for batting and bowling strategies

attacking.description: Aggressive batting approach with more aerial shots

defensive.description: Conservative batting approach with more grounded shots

contactThresholds.description: Contact type probability thresholds based on decision score delta

baseProbabilityMatrix.description: Base probabilities based on batting decision score minus bowling decision score

executionAdjustments.description: Probability adjustments per execution score difference

d40Roll.description: Random variance added to raw attribute scores

edgeBehavior.description: Edges with contactQuality < -30 go behind wicket, better edges go to slips

poorContact.description: 50% chance ball carries to keeper, 50% falls short (dot ball)

tierWicketBonus.description: Additive % wicket-probability bonus per acceleration tier. Range 0% (Blockade) to 2% (HOGO).
